data.title: Write RED structural boundary tests for interaction halt mechanism and entry gates
data.description:
## Description
Write failing structural boundary tests for all changes required by story 3c31-8050:

**Test 1: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-interaction-halt.sh** (NEW)
Asserts in plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md:
- Halt mechanism triggered by AMBIGUITY or CONFLICT signals from cross-epic scan
- Two resolution options presented for ambiguity: (a) namespace owner, (b) shared usage with integration contract AC
- One resolution path for conflict: choose authoritative approach, flag other epic for revision
- Re-scan after resolution bounded by brainstorm.max_interaction_cycles (default 2)
- INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED signal written in non-interactive mode (following replan-observability contract format)
- interaction:deferred tag set on epic in non-interactive mode
- Ordering note: interaction halt runs BEFORE scrutiny pipeline re-entry

**Test 2: tests/skills/test-interaction-deferred-gates.sh** (NEW)
Asserts:
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md: interaction:deferred entry gate (block + direct to /dso:brainstorm interactive re-run)
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md: interaction:deferred entry gate (same pattern)
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md: filter stories/epics tagged interaction:deferred from execution batch
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md: file exists and contains writer, readers, lifecycle, removal conditions

Also update .test-index mappings:
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md -> tests/skills/test-brainstorm-interaction-halt.sh
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md -> tests/skills/test-interaction-deferred-gates.sh
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md -> tests/skills/test-interaction-deferred-gates.sh
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md -> tests/skills/test-interaction-deferred-gates.sh
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md -> tests/skills/test-interaction-deferred-gates.sh

Testing mode: RED (all tests must fail before Tasks 2-5 are implemented)

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-brainstorm-interaction-halt.sh (CREATE)
- tests/skills/test-interaction-deferred-gates.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE)
